raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying and explaining multiple inconsistencies and gaps in the original text.",
    "R1.7": "The agent meticulously checks all citations, flags missing ones, and provides precise bibliographic details for key works that should be cited.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks uncertainty for several claims, such as the exact sample counts and tool versions, and notes that these cannot be verified without additional data or code.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays strictly within the agreed scope of the Methods section, addressing all relevant issues without drifting into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could lead to downstream harm if not addressed.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear source and rationale, ensuring full traceability of the revisions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying and explaining multiple inconsistencies and gaps in the original text.
rationale.R1.7: The agent meticulously checks all citations, flags missing ones, and provides precise bibliographic details for key works that should be cited.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty for several claims, such as the exact sample counts and tool versions, and notes that these cannot be verified without additional data or code.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays strictly within the agreed scope of the Methods section, addressing all relevant issues without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could lead to downstream harm if not addressed.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear source and rationale, ensuring full traceability of the revisions.
